---
title: "Jocelyn Magner"
image: media/profile.JPG
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jocelyn-magner/
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/jmagner4
      target: _blank
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:jmagner@ucsb.edu
---

Hello! My name is Jocelyn Magner. I am a third-year transfer student at the University of California, Santa Barbara. I am currently working on my B.S. in Environmental Studies and Geography. This website is my personal portfolio, showcasing my academic and professional achievements, as well as my personal hobbies and travels.
